title: Minimal Armor
description:
Less Armor, More Skin.

[Addon for Faithful x32]
body:
Less obtrusive armor variations to show more of your skin.

No change to the turtle helmet. Includes armor trims.


These armor textures were made from and to be used with Faithful 32x on Minecraft 1.20.4, but the latest version should be okay with versions of Minecraft newer than 1.13. I have also made a "universal" version that lists all versions from 1.13 and newer.
